'''chashogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smalltalk|smalltalk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smalltalk|smalltalk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chashogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshegeth|chæshegeth]] || [[word:chæshegej|chæshegej]] || [[word:chæshegesh|chæshegesh]] || [[word:chæshege|chæshege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashoshogoth|chashoshogoth]] || [[word:chashoshogoj|chashoshogoj]] || [[word:chashoshogosh|chashoshogosh]] || [[word:chashoshogo|chashoshogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chashogoth|chashogoth]] || [[word:chashogoj|chashogoj]] || [[word:chashogosh|chashogosh]] || [[word:chashogo|chashogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashofgoth|chashofgoth]] || [[word:chashofgoj|chashofgoj]] || [[word:chashofgosh|chashofgosh]] || [[word:chashofgof|chashofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chashogotho|chashogotho]] || [[word:chashogojo|chashogojo]] || [[word:chashogosho|chashogosho]] || [[word:chashogoko|chashogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chashogoth|chashogoth]] || [[word:chashogoj|chashogoj]] || [[word:chashogosh|chashogosh]] || [[word:chashogo|chashogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chashogothol|chashogothol]] || [[word:chashogojol|chashogojol]] || [[word:chashogoshol|chashogoshol]] || [[word:chashogokol|chashogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chashogothotho|chashogothotho]] || [[word:chashogojojo|chashogojojo]] || [[word:chashogoshosho|chashogoshosho]] || [[word:chashogoko|chashogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chashogothon|chashogothon]] || [[word:chashogojon|chashogojon]] || [[word:chashogoshon|chashogoshon]] || [[word:chashogokon|chashogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chashogothoro|chashogothoro]] || [[word:chashogojoro|chashogojoro]] || [[word:chashogoshoro|chashogoshoro]] || [[word:chashogokoro|chashogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
